prompt: Create a hyper-realistic open-world crime-game gameplay screenshot inspired by a modern Miami-style beach city, showing a stylish young man with short dark hair, trimmed beard, aviator sunglasses, and an open navy Hawaiian shirt with large pink-orange flowers standing at an outdoor beach club bar and holding a tropical cocktail garnished with fruit. The camera is in a third-person gameplay-cinematic angle from behind the bartender, framing the player character in the center-left foreground as he faces a bartender in a teal polo shirt across a white stone counter. Set the scene at a lively beachfront party during warm late-afternoon sunlight, with 1 bartender, 1 main playable character, and around 12 partygoers dancing and mingling on the sand and deck behind him. Include tall palm trees, the ocean horizon, beach umbrellas, bottles on the bar, and an art-deco club building with glowing neon signage reading VICE BEACH CLUB plus a circular neon palm-tree logo. Add a luxurious, sun-drenched Vice City vibe with long shadows, haze, reflections, and saturated tropical colors. Overlay authentic video game HUD elements: 1 circular mini-map in the bottom-left corner, and 1 circular weapon-selection wheel in the bottom-right corner showing 8 slots with visible icons for handgun, submachine gun, shotgun, rifle, melee, throwable, and empty/inactive slots. The image should look like a polished AAA console gameplay capture, ultra-detailed, realistic skin and fabric, dynamic crowd poses, shallow atmospheric depth, and subtle lens bloom.
